arts.ttl: John McGinn gives his verdict on Marcus Rashford's start to life at Aston Villa and makes a prediction about the on-loan Man United star
arts.sum: John McGinn has hailed the impact of Aston Villa's loan stars and backed Marcus Rashford to score his first goal for the club when the Champions League resumes on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: John McGinn reveals Marcus Rashford wish as 'big egos' fear rejected
arts.sum: John McGinn has praised Marcus Rashford and Marco Asensio’s work ethic since joining Aston Villa last month. John McGinn reveals Marcus Rashford wish as 'big egos' fear rejected

arts.ttl: 'It's on us' - John McGinn makes brutally honest Aston Villa admission ahead of Club Brugge clash - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Aston Villa midfielder John McGinn has previewed the Champions League round of 16 first leg clash against Club Brugge John McGinn believes Aston Villa still have some levels to go through in the final months of the season, admitting they've been too easy to play against.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery confirms triple Aston Villa injury boost for Club Brugge clash in the Champions League
arts.sum: Unai Emery has confirmed Pau Torres, Tyrone Mings and Matty Cash have all travelled to Brugge for Tuesday night’s Champions League round of 16 first leg at the Jan Breydel Stadium. Ross Barkley and Amadou Onana remain sidelined, while Donyell Malen and Andres Garcia are not available as they were left out of the squad for the Champions League knockout rounds.

arts.ttl: Club Brugge youngster departs Belgium to join up with Norwegian side SK Brann
arts.sum: Club Brugge have confirmed that young defender Denzel De Roeve has left the club after over nine seasons. De Roeve will join up with Norwegian side SK Brann, who finished…

arts.ttl: Club Brugge scouting report: How good are Aston Villa's Champions League Last 16 opponents?
arts.sum: Although Aston Villa’s form in the Premier League this season has been anything but consistent, Unai Emery’s side have done remarkably well in the Champions League. Not only did the...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa handed major injury boosts ahead of Club Brugge clash
arts.sum: Aston Villa will pay both legs of their Champions League round of 16 tie against Club Brugge either side of facing Brentford away before the March international break Aston Villa handed major injury boosts ahead of Club Brugge clash

arts.ttl: What Club Brugge manager said about Aston Villa and Marcus Rashford didn't shock me
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford, Marco Asensio and Axel Disasi could all feature in the Champions League for the first time as Aston Villa's players on Tuesday “It doesn’t change the quality in their team (when players play in different positions).”

arts.ttl: FA Cup quarter-finals: Bournemouth to face Man City, Preston to host Villa
arts.sum: In-form Bournemouth are drawn at home to Manchester City in the FA Cup quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: Club Brugge suffer big injury blow before Aston Villa clash in the Champions League
arts.sum: Club Brugge manager Nicky Hayen has confirmed Joaquin Seys will miss their Champions League round of 16 first leg clash against Aston Villa through injury. Club Brugge suffer big injury blow before Aston Villa clash in the Champions League
